news_headlines.title: Disney Stock Is Trading Like a Cruise Line. Now Could Be the Time to Buy.
news_headlines.summary: Walt Disney  stock could bounce if the company focuses the next chapter of growth on its media business, Needham says.  Analyst Laura Martin wrote in a research note Tuesday that  Disney  stock is trading like a cruise ship company, not a media company.  Disney is currently trading at 13.7 times earnings over the next 12 months, which is a drop from its five-year average of 27.4 times.

news_headlines.title: Can NCLH's Revenue Management Overhaul Drive Long-Term Gains?
news_headlines.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) is implementing a significant overhaul of its revenue management strategy to address past execution gaps in pricing, marketing, and deployment. The company is investing in technology and aiming for tighter commercial alignment to improve financial performance, despite near-term pressure affecting its 2026 guidance. While NCLH's stock has underperformed competitors, these strategic changes are intended to position the company for more sustainable growth in the long run.

news_headlines.title: Holland America Line Marks 153 Years of Exploration with Special 'Anniversary Sale'
news_headlines.summary: For 153 years, Holland America Line has perfected the art of leisurely travel, inviting guests to connect to the world and each other. This April, the brand celebrates with a monthlong Anniversary Sale featuring fare discounts, onboard credits, reduced deposits, and free fares for kids. Running from April 2–30, 2026, the Anniversary Sale includes departures from April 2026 through spring 2027, with cruises ranging from four to 69 days.

news_headlines.title: Chevron vs ExxonMobil: Which Energy Stock Will Win In The New Oil Landscape?
news_headlines.summary: This article compares Chevron (CVX) and ExxonMobil (XOM) as dividend stocks, highlighting their record production in 2025 and differing approaches to shareholder returns and cost management. While Chevron offers a higher dividend yield, ExxonMobil demonstrates superior dividend coverage and a stronger balance sheet. The author concludes that ExxonMobil presents a more defensible payout for long-term investors through oil price cycles, whereas Chevron's success hinges on the timely execution of its cost reduction program.

news_headlines.title: Carnival Corporation signs multi‑year partnership with Conservation International
news_headlines.summary: Carnival Corporation has partnered with Conservation International in a three-year initiative to restore mangrove forests in the Caribbean, focusing on safeguarding critical coastal ecosystems. The grant will fund natural regeneration of mangroves, strengthen research, and support nature-dependent small businesses. This collaboration aims to protect biodiversity, advance marine protection, and accelerate climate solutions while enhancing local livelihoods.

news_headlines.title: Why Raymond James sees Disney stock as undervalued
news_headlines.summary: Raymond James upgraded Disney to outperform with a $115 price target, arguing that the stock is undervalued even under pessimistic financial scenarios. Analysts believe that current macroeconomic and operational challenges are already priced into the stock, presenting an attractive entry point for investors. Needham analyst Laura Martin echoed this sentiment, highlighting that Disney is trading at a valuation typical of a travel and leisure company rather than a media company, suggesting a significant upside if the market revalues it as a media business.

news_headlines.title: Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE:CCL) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
news_headlines.summary: Carnival Corporation & plc reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, surpassing guidance due to higher yields and better cost performance, despite geopolitical challenges and a significant fuel headwind. The company introduced its "PROPEL: Powering Growth & Returns, Responsibly" strategy, targeting aggressive ROIC, EPS growth, and shareholder returns by 2029. This strategy emphasizes yield expansion, disciplined capacity growth, monetization of destination assets, and continued cost discipline, supported by operational efficiencies and technological advancements.

news_headlines.title: Las Vegas Rolls The Dice On ‘All-Inclusive’ Hotel Offers
news_headlines.summary: MGM Resorts International is introducing "all-inclusive" packages at its Luxor and Excalibur hotels on the Las Vegas Strip, starting April 6th. These packages aim to provide a more predictable vacation cost for travelers facing rising gas prices and airfare, bundling hotel stays, resort fees, dining, entertainment tickets, and parking. While not traditional all-inclusive like Caribbean resorts, the offerings provide structured meals and pre-selected entertainment to help guests manage their budget.

news_headlines.title: Niagen Bioscience Announces First Cruise Ship Clinic Partnership with OneSpaWorld, Bringing the NAD-Boosting Benefits of Niagen IV to the High Seas
news_headlines.summary: Niagen Bioscience has partnered with OneSpaWorld to offer its pharmaceutical-grade Niagen IV in over 80 Medi-Spa clinics on high-end cruise ships. This collaboration marks Niagen Bioscience's first venture into cruise ship clinics, expanding its Niagen Plus footprint and making its NAD-boosting IV available to travelers seeking wellness experiences at sea. The partnership aims to provide a premium, science-backed solution for healthy aging to a new consumer base.

news_headlines.title: Cruise spa operator brings Niagen IV to more than 80 ship clinics
news_headlines.summary: Niagen Bioscience has partnered with OneSpaWorld to offer its pharmaceutical-grade Niagen IV at over 80 Medi-Spa clinics on high-end cruise ships. This collaboration marks Niagen Bioscience's first cruise ship clinic partnership, expanding its Niagen Plus™ footprint globally. The Niagen IV, a next-generation formulation of patented nicotinamide riboside, offers a better patient experience, shorter infusion times, and a faster rise in NAD+ blood levels compared to traditional NAD+ IV, aiming to cater to an increasing demand for science-backed wellness experiences among travelers.

news_headlines.title: Carnival Corporation and Bermuda Leaders Chart a Course for Guest Experience
news_headlines.summary: Carnival Corporation and Bermuda's business and tourism leaders met to discuss enhancing guest experiences and deepening their partnership. Discussions covered expanding shore excursions, ongoing port developments at King’s Wharf, and Bermuda's wider tourism vision. Both parties emphasized a shared belief that the best guest experiences are built collaboratively.

news_headlines.title: Carnival Corporation reports no ‘significant’ cancellation trends
news_headlines.summary: Carnival Corporation has not observed any significant cancellation trends among its cruise lines following the outbreak of war in the Middle East. The company reported record revenues of $6.2 billion for its first quarter and expressed satisfaction with current booking volumes, though they acknowledge the impact of the conflict. Carnival's CEO emphasized the importance of fuel efficiency and the critical role of travel agents in their business model.

news_headlines.title: Micron Drops 6% After Citi’s Price Target Cut: 3 Reasons Bears and Bulls Are Both Right
news_headlines.summary: Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) stock is down 6% to $347 in early trading this Thursday morning, reversing a large portion of yesterday’s 8.88% rally that closed the stock at $367.85. news_headlines.title: Amazon Stock Climbs as It Bets a Jaw-Dropping $50 Billion on OpenAI’s Meteoric $852 Billion Rise
news_headlines.summary: The race to control the future of artificial intelligence just took a massive leap forward with a record-shaking deal. On Wednesday, Amazon stock (AMZN) rose 1% in pre-market trading following the news that it is leading a historic $122 billion funding round for OpenAI. This investment pushes the valuation of the ChatGPT creator to a jaw-dropping $852 billion, clearing the path for what could be the largest IPO in history later this year. news_headlines.summary: SAN JOSE, Calif. & NEW YORK, April 02, 2026--Aviz Networks, a leader in open, AI-optimized networking software, and VAST Data, the AI Operating System company, today announced an integrated solution designed to simplify how enterprises deploy storage networking as part of NVIDIA AI factory environments.
